LOOP.COMMENT: -- Loop over to get the value for Formula IDs --

MAP.COMMENT: -- Call BRE Rule to get the attribute details --

INVOKE.COMMENT: --VE-1355 used monitoringDate--- Get Current Challenge Period Details --

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1355 Added to filter current period ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
